summary: Iteration 47: Complete testing of 3 new feature sets - Enhanced Predictive Analytics, Report Customization, and Push Notification Preferences. All backend APIs (19/19) passed, all frontend features working correctly.
seed_data_creation: Created TEST_View_FrontendTest view (cleaned up in tests)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 47 tested 3 feature sets. All features working: (1) Predictions API: inventory-demand, customer-clv, peak-hours, profit-decomposition endpoints all return correct data structures. (2) Report Views: CRUD operations (list, create, delete) + /data/{type} endpoint work correctly. (3) Push Notifications: vapid-key, subscribe, unsubscribe, preferences, status endpoints all functional.

prediction_endpoints.GET /api/predictions/inventory-demand: PASS - Returns items, total_items_tracked, items_at_risk, forecast_period
prediction_endpoints.GET /api/predictions/customer-clv: PASS - Returns customers, segments (Platinum/Gold/Silver/Bronze), total_projected_revenue, avg_clv
prediction_endpoints.GET /api/predictions/peak-hours: PASS - Returns hourly_analysis (24 hours), peak_hours, slow_hours, heatmap, recommendations
prediction_endpoints.GET /api/predictions/profit-decompositio: PASS - Returns daily, monthly, seasonality, anomalies, summary with profit_trend

report_views_endpoints.GET /api/report-views: PASS - Returns list of saved views
report_views_endpoints.POST /api/report-views: PASS - Creates new view with id, name, report_type, filters, columns
report_views_endpoints.DELETE /api/report-views/{id}: PASS - Deletes view, returns 404 on re-delete

push_notification_endpoints.PUT /api/push/preferences: PASS - Updates preferences, verified with GET

analytics_page_new_tabs.Demand tab (data-testid=ai-demand-tab): PASS - Shows Items Tracked, At Risk, Forecast Period
analytics_page_new_tabs.CLV tab (data-testid=ai-clv-tab): PASS - Shows customers with segments, projected revenue, customer table
analytics_page_new_tabs.Peak Hours tab (data-testid=ai-peak-tab): PASS - Shows peak/slow hours, staffing recommendations, hourly distribution chart
analytics_page_new_tabs.Profit tab (data-testid=ai-profit-tab): PASS - Shows daily profit vs trend, day-of-week seasonality, monthly P&L

reports_page_custom_reports_tab.Custom Report Builder: PASS - Report type dropdown, date inputs, branch filter, Generate button
reports_page_custom_reports_tab.Visible Columns toggles: PASS - Toggle badges for columns (date, amount, etc)
reports_page_custom_reports_tab.Save as View: PASS - View name input + Save View button
reports_page_custom_reports_tab.Saved Views section: PASS - Shows saved views with load/delete functionality
reports_page_custom_reports_tab.Results table: PASS - Displays data with summary stats and Export CSV button

notification_preferences_page.Notification Types toggles (7 items): PASS - All toggles functional (low_stock_alerts, leave_requests, order_updates, loan_installments, expense_anomalies, document_expiry, daily_summary)
notification_preferences_page.Save Preferences button: PASS - Saves and shows success toast
